typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varExtractDt as timestamp (),
	varMaxDt as timestamp (),
	varMinDt as timestamp (),
	varOctCode as integer (),
	varRowCt as integer (),
	varSSISOps_B0776586E1094732BABF851EBB7A22F6_RowCount_1 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_B0776586E1094732BABF851EBB7A22F6_RowCount_2 as integer (),
	varSSISOps_DisableBIxAuditing as boolean (),
	varSSISOps_GroupNames as string (),
	pkgParamBatchID as integer (),
	pkgParamDestinationConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamInterfaceID as integer (),
	pkgParamPackageID as integer (),
	pkgParamSourceConnectionString as string (),
	pkgParamSourceStoredProcedure as string ()
}

source(output(
		SiteCode as string,
		OctopusCode as integer,
		ITEM_CODE as string,
		NUM_UNITS as integer,
		EXTRACT_DATE as timestamp,
		PRODUCT_CLASS_CODE as string,
		UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CODE as string,
		InsertDate as timestamp,
		UpdateDate as timestamp,
		Source as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: '$Package::pkgParamSourceStoredProcedure',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource	source(output(
		AA_CODE as string,
		AA_AS_ID as integer,
		AA_AN_ID as integer,
		AH_ID_NOTES as string,
		AA_AT_ID as integer,
		AA_DESIGNATION_FR as string,
		AA_DESIGNATION_EN as string,
		AA_DESIGNATION2 as string,
		AA_COMMANDE_MIN as integer,
		AA_COMMENTAIRE as string,
		AA_CODE_DOUANIER as string,
		AA_MAJORATION as long,
		AA_PA_FILE as string,
		AA_ROOT_CODE as string,
		AA_PP_ID as integer,
		AA_ACTIVATE_DATE as timestamp,
		AA_PST_ID as integer,
		AA_MAX_ORDER as integer,
		AA_UNIT_SET as integer,
		AA_BAGS_PALLET as integer,
		AA_INSERTDATE as timestamp,
		AA_UPDATEDATE as timestamp,
		AA_BY as string,
		AA_PROSPECTION as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from dbo.ACA_ARTICLE',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupLKPTABLE
OLEDBSource derive(SiteCode = SiteCode) ~> PlaceHolderSRCOLEDBSource
PlaceHolderSRCOLEDBSource derive(strSource = toString(Source)) ~> DataConversion
DataConversion,LookupLKPTABLE lookup(ITEM_CODE == AA_CODE,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> Lookup
Lookup split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupIsMatch@Match derive(AA_DESIGNATION_EN = AA_DESIGNATION_EN) ~> PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination
PlaceHolderDESTOLEDBDestination sink(input(
		AASD_INSERTDATE as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		AASD_QTY as integer,
		AASD_BY as string,
		AASD_UPDATEDATE as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		AASD_DATE as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		AASD_AA_CODE as string,
		AASD_ACS_ID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		AASD_INSERTDATE = InsertDate,
		AASD_QTY = NUM_UNITS,
		AASD_BY = strSource,
		AASD_UPDATEDATE = UpdateDate,
		AASD_DATE = EXTRACT_DATE,
		AASD_AA_CODE = ITEM_CODE,
		AASD_ACS_ID = OctopusCode)) ~> OLEDBDestination
